title: Sa La Te Sa La Na Te
original_title: Sa La Te Sa La Na Te
overview: A commentary about the state of journalism on the backdrop of environmental exploitation of the ecologically sensitive Tadoba Tiger Reserve, the film explores the consequences of modern profiteering-driven news on the world, and on personal relationships.
